section.title: Featured Projects
section.subtitle: Selected work showcasing depth, impact, and problem-solving

project.name: Spotify Analytics Dashboard
project.tagline: Personalized music insights and playlist intelligence
project.description: A web application for visualizing personalized Spotify data. Users can explore top artists, top tracks, recently played songs, and detailed audio features. The platform also generates and saves recommended playlists based on listening behavior.

media.alt: Spotify analytics dashboard showing top artists and tracks

highlights: Dynamic data visualization of listening patterns

impact.problem: Users lack meaningful insights into their music consumption patterns.
impact.solution: Built an interactive dashboard that transforms raw Spotify data into actionable insights.
impact.outcome: Enabled users to understand preferences and discover new music effortlessly.

project.name: Smart Playlist Generator
project.description: An intelligent playlist generator that analyzes existing Spotify playlists and recommends new tracks using audio features and user preferences.

media.alt: Playlist generation interface with recommended tracks

impact.problem: Creating high-quality playlists manually is time-consuming.
impact.solution: Automated playlist generation using listening behavior and audio metadata.
impact.outcome: Reduced playlist creation time while improving relevance of recommendations.
